Importmap failures boot would hit are wire diagnostics: an entry
naming a missing asset fails generation, not the first page render.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper => ASSETSDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/assets.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:assets
//go:embed all:assets
var Assets embed.FS
-- web/assets/app.js --
export {}
-- web/assets/importmap.json --
{
  "app": {"path": "gone.js", "entrypoint": true}
}
-- want/diags --
error: web/assets.go:5:1: assetmapper.Check: importmap entry "app" resolves to "gone.js", which is not a known asset
  help: assets are compiled and checked at generation time; fix the tree and rerun
